title: Generative AI for Code Completion
summary: This is a short online course that teaches software engineers and developers how to use generative AI for code completion. It covers fundamental concepts and practical applications, including the use of tools like ChatGPT and GitHub Copilot. The course aims to enhance coding productivity, reduce errors, and improve code quality. Learners will evaluate AI-driven code completion tools and apply best practices in real-world scenarios.
author: Dev Ramesh
